description: Degenerate empty-JSON answer: after the loop seam recovers a leaked READ (search_assets) and feeds the result back, the model's next completion is literally '{}'. Provenance: 2026-06-10 post-fix deepseek-r1:8b conversational eval (machina-eval-postfix-deepseek-2026-06-10.md), 7 turns. No guard catches it today: it is not tool-call-shaped (no name/function marker), not an empty string (the empty-response fallback does not fire), and not a prior-turn echo, so the bare '{}' reaches the user raw. Pinned as disposition 'clean' per R12; the degenerate-JSON guard flips this to 'fallback_empty'.
